title: Birlacraft
body:
# Birlacraft

I hope you are having a good day :)

This is the official modpack for the **Birland server**. Birland is a private server for a large group of extended friends. If you know one of us, join the Discord to get whitelisted! Join us here: https://discord.gg/W3Gs5JAEV7

If you stumbled upon this modpack by chance, here's what it offers:
- **Great performance** featuring modern Fabric tools (sodium, starlight, etc.)
- Tech: **Create** is the main tech mod of the pack
- Magic: **Hex Casting** and **Bewitchment** are the figureheads of the magic divisions, with plenty supporting magic mods in between
- Worldgen and Adventure awaits, along with an Origins experience

---
*pssst-- https://discord.gg/W3Gs5JAEV7*
